narrative_beat: Rosto Orwell em perfil ¾, olhando para cima em terror, reflexo de um olho de câmera de vigilância gigante vermelho-carmesim no côncavo de seu olho, como se o Grande Irmão habitasse nele

style_reference.textual_description: extreme dark cinematic, crimson surveillance glow, Orwell's terror, reflection in eye, oppressive atmosphere, maximum contrast, 35mm grain

shot.type: extreme close-up — face filling left half, eye reflection visible
shot.depth_of_field: eye tack sharp, everything else falls off

subject.primary: photorealistic George Orwell face in ¾ profile, gaunt features, mustache, head tilted back slightly looking upward in absolute terror — occupying left 45% of frame — face lit by a pulsing red-crimson surveillance light from above
subject.focal_point: Orwell's visible eye — in the glossy surface of his iris/cornea, a blurred crimson reflection of a surveillance camera lens is clearly visible
subject.secondary: crimson-red surveillance camera LED glow casting raking light across his gaunt cheekbone and temple
props: crimson-red surveillance camera glow from above
reflection of camera lens in eye cornea
floating ash embers in red-tinged air

environment.location: total darkness surrounding — only the crimson surveillance light source illuminates his face from above-right — background hint of blurred surveillance cameras and Big Brother poster in darkness
environment.atmosphere: the surveillance state looking back through its prophet

composition.rule: dramatic ¾ profile — face left 45% — empty dark right 35% for text overlay
composition.foreground: Orwell's face in crimson-lit terror — gaunt cheekbone, sunken eye, mustache
composition.midground: thin crimson light beam raking across face from upper right
composition.background: total darkness with subtle blurred red-tinged surveillance cameras — right third of frame intentionally dark and empty
composition.safe_zone_for_overlay: right third (35%) of frame and bottom strip — kept fully dark for title text

lighting.key_light: hard crimson surveillance LED from upper right, casting raking shadows across gaunt face
lighting.rim_light: faint amber candle from far left giving slight warm separation from pure black background
lighting.mood: the watcher being watched — prophecy becoming surveillance
lighting.shadow_quality: deep crushed blacks, single crimson light source, maximum shadow depth

style.film_stock: Kodak Portra 400 pushed four stops — extreme grain
style.post_processing: extreme contrast — near-black background vs crimson face illumination, halation on crimson light, heavy 35mm grain, dark vignette all edges, faint amber separation light on far side of face
style.texture_detail: heavy 35mm film grain, floating ash embers red-tinged, skin texture under extreme contrast

mood.emotion: total terror — the surveillance state has already arrived
mood.tension: maximum — the eye contains what he feared

symbolism.primary: the surveillance camera reflected in Orwell's eye = Big Brother is watching through him
symbolism.secondary: crimson light = danger, blood, the mark of the beast — Apocalipse 13

negative_as_positive: photorealistic — not illustrated, not CGI, not comic book
Orwell face MUST show genuine terror — not calm, not neutral, not heroic
face MUST be lit by crimson/red light — not warm amber or golden
eye reflection MUST be visible — camera lens ghost in the cornea
right third MUST be completely dark and empty — for post-production text
no text, no logos, no watermarks in the generated image

in_scene_text.note: DANIEL PREVIU / 1984 / 2.500 ANOS ANTES overlay will be added post-production on right third

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer grain and atmosphere. Override color palette: primary light must be crimson-red surveillance glow, not amber candle.
